name: markdown2pdf
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends chromium && go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.10.1 && go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest && npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli && go mod download
